name: telecommunications_reconciliation_job_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A carrier network operations center is managing degraded service or lawful-intercept adjacent requests with customer impact. Peering, lawful process, and uptime commitments are all in conflict. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: telecommunications reconciliation job lumen tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Pager queues are saturated; middle management is forwarding screenshots from an internal channel that is already leaking. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Keisha Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Keisha Ishikawa, the accountable decision-maker on this Telecommunications bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Mira Diallo
agents.identity: I am Mira Diallo, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Keisha Ishikawa must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Keisha Ishikawa do?
